title: oldenlandia coerulescens
intro: Oldenlandia coerulescens, also known as Blue Marsh Marigold or Chinese Snake Grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia coerulescens include its ability to lower fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, making it a popular remedy for various illnesses. In traditional herbal preparations, Oldenlandia coerulescens is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and decoctions that are used to treat a range of health conditions.
